title: Foresight
content:
There once was a pious young priest,
     Who lived almost wholly on yeast;
        "For," he said, "it is plain
        We must all rise again,
     And I want to get started, at least."
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Foresight"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
